statement: In every magma, Equation 1804 (`x = (y * z) * ((z * w) * w)`) implies Equation 2268 (`x = (x * (y * (y * y))) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0452
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op (op z w) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op x (op y (op y y))) z)
